---
name: weekly-review
description: "Use when: weekly review, delivery review, run delivery review, weekly ops, risk and dependency review"
---

Run a full weekly review:

1. **Delivery Health** — follow [Workflows/risk-and-dependency-review.md](../../Workflows/risk-and-dependency-review.md)
2. **Risk Register** — surface any new or escalated risks; update [Artifacts/risk-registers/](../../Artifacts/risk-registers/) if needed
3. **Executive Summary** — check if [Artifacts/executive-updates/](../../Artifacts/executive-updates/) needs a refresh; follow [Workflows/executive-update.md](../../Workflows/executive-update.md)

For each area, apply [Evals/actionability-check.md](../../Evals/actionability-check.md) before finalizing.

Output a brief status summary with:
- what was reviewed
- top risks or blockers
- decisions needed before next week
